title: Marvell (MRVL) Q3 Earnings Preview Analysis
text: Wall Street analysts anticipate Marvell Technology will report quarterly earnings of $0.75 per share, representing a 74.4% year-over-year increase. Revenue projections stand at $2.06 billion, up 36% from the prior-year quarter. The consensus EPS estimate has undergone a modest upward revision of 0.3% over the past 30 days. Earnings estimate revisions serve as a critical gauge for predicting potential investor behaviors. Revenue Breakdown by End Market: Data Center at $1.49 billion (+35.7% YoY), the largest revenue contributor; Enterprise Networking at $251.26 million (+66.5% YoY); Carrier Infrastructure at $169.92 million (+100.6% YoY), showing the strongest growth; Consumer at $112.99 million (+17.1% YoY); and Automotive/Industrial at $34.90 million (-57.9% YoY), the only declining segment. Marvell carries a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) rating. Over the past month, MRVL shares have declined 5.7%, underperforming the S&P 500's -0.3% change.
